examples: He turned up late to the meeting.
She turned up the heat in the room.
She turned up at my door unexpectedly.
He turned up the brightness on his phone.
The missing keys turned up in the drawer.
They turned up the pressure on the team.
Don't worry, he'll turn up eventually.
Can you turn up the volume?
example_translate: Она неожиданно появилась у моей двери.
Не волнуйся, он в конце концов появится.
turn up.synonyms:
Появляться, приходить - arrive, appear, show up
Увеличивать (громкость, интенсивность) - increase, raise
